hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */fixtures/flam3-goldens/*/golden.png|*/fixtures/*.flam3) printf 'BLOCKED: %s is a load-bearing parity reference. Document the intentional change in BACKLOG + ROADMAP first, then disable this hook for one edit.\n' "$f" >&2; exit 2 ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */src/shaders/*.wgsl) printf '[hook] WGSL edited (%s) — render path may have changed. Run `npm run test:parity` (~91s) before FF-merge to verify BE↔flam3-C parity.\n' "$(basename "$f")" >&2 ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */src/*.test.ts) ;; */src/*.ts) grep -nE 'typeof window|typeof process|isNode|process\.env|globalThis\.(navigator|window|document)[[:space:]]*=' "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf '[hook] %s touches an env branch — the FE/BE seam forbids env branching in engine modules (#15). Run `npm run typecheck:engine` to confirm the no-DOM kernel still compiles.\n' "$(basename "$f")" >&2; grep -nE '\.innerHTML\b' "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf '[hook] %s uses .innerHTML — pyr3 forbids it (src/no-innerhtml.test.ts). Build DOM with createElement/textContent.\n' "$(basename "$f")" >&2 ;; esac

if [ "$(basename "$PWD")" != "pyr3" ] && [ -d "$PWD/pyr3" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"\u26a0\ufe0f CWD is %s but pyr3/ exists as a subdir. Suggest cd-ing into pyr3 to keep memory and .remember/ aligned (parent-dir CWDs sprout a parallel project-memory store that has to be migrated later)."}}' "$(basename "$PWD")"; fi
